description_long: This is a three-drawer filing cabinet with a dark woodgrain finish, featuring three wide, horizontally-aligned handles on the front. The cabinet is rectangular and has a flat top surface suitable for placing objects. The front view reveals three distinct compartments, each with a handle, suggesting individual storage spaces. The rear view shows the interior structure, with white internal panels and mounting brackets, indicating a sturdy build and possible modular assembly. The sides are plain, with the woodgrain pattern continuing seamlessly. This cabinet is designed for organized storage and is likely to be found in professional or administrative environments.
description: A dark woodgrain three-drawer filing cabinet with wide black handles and a flat top, designed for organized storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain woodgrain panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three wide drawers, each with a black horizontal handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the plain woodgrain panel.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the white internal structure and mounting brackets, with open compartments.
